https://github.com/godotengine/godot/com.commit_message:
Merge pull request #114159 from YeldhamDev/owners_dialog_touchup

Touch-up the Owners dialog

ranked_scenarios.summary: Add leftover scroll hints, and panels for scrollables without hints

description.text:
- Add scroll hints to places I missed in the editor.
- Add background panels for places where scroll hints couldn't be enabled. This is a stopgap until those places can be redesigned.

Fixes #113707.
Supersedes #113796.

closed_issues.summary: Create node window tree has no background color

description.text: ### Tested versions - Reproducible in 4.6.dev6 - Not reproducible in 4.5 ### System information Windows 11, Godot 4.6.dev6 ### Issue description In 4.6 template there's no background on the node tree in the 'Create New Node' window making it hard to tell where the tree ends and the split panel begins: Here is 4.5: This is a usability issue as that split panel lets you resize it to make reading node descriptions easier, so it's very helpful for the user to know exactly where it is: ### Steps to reproduce - Click the 'add new node' button on any scene. ### Minimal reproduction project (MRP) N/A

- remove awkward `Of` capitalization
- show total owner count
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2223172/171759161-592ed1a5-5ae1-4880-aaa1-3089732ba1ef.png)

Resized some dialogs that would take a default size of 80% of the window size. Specifically

- FileDialog --> `(700, 500)` or `0.8`
- EditorFileDialog --> `(1050, 700) * EDSCALE` or `0.8`
- DependencyEditor --> `0.4`
- DependencyOwnersEditor --> `0.3`
- OrphanResourcesDialog --> `0.4`
- ReparentDialog --> `(350, 700) * EDSCALE`
- SceneTreeDialog --> `(350, 700) * EDSCALE`

Size of `(Editor)FileDialog` can now also be easily updated in `popup_file_dialog`, and the `SceneTreeDialog` in `popup_scenetree_dialog`.
